     2→<html lang="en" data-theme="light">
     3→<head>
     4→  <meta charset="UTF-8">

     6→  <title>Sagkeeng Anicinabe Nation — Community Calendar</title>
     7→  <meta name="description" content="Events, ceremonies, and notices for Sagkeeng Anicinabe Nation. Zaagiing — Mouth of the River.">

    16→  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    17→  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    18→  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fraunces:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..144,400;0,9..144,500;0,9..144,600;1,9..144,400;1,9..144,500&family=Hanken+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    19→
    20→  <style>
    21→/* ============================================================================
    22→   SAGKEENG COMMUNITY CALENDAR  —  "Signal Fire" design system
    23→   ============================================================================
    24→   The idea: the warm glow of a gathering fire against the deep blue of the
    25→   river at dusk. Fire is the brand (Signal Fire) and the sacred centre of the
    26→   gathering. Warmth draws people in; the river grounds it in this place.
    27→
    28→   Display: Fraunces (warm optical serif).  Body/UI: Hanken Grotesk.
    29→   Re-theme everything from the tokens in :root.
    30→   ============================================================================ */
    31→
    32→/* ── TOKENS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    33→:root {
    34→  /* Neutrals — warm, clean (not the usual AI cream) */
    35→  --ink:        #1c1714;
    36→  --ink-2:      #534a42;
    37→  --ink-3:      #8a7f74;
    38→  --paper:      #faf8f4;
    39→  --paper-2:    #f3efe7;
    40→  --paper-3:    #ece6da;
    41→  --line:       #e4ddd0;
    42→  --line-2:     #d6cdbd;
    43→
    44→  /* Signal fire — the warmth */
    45→  --ember:      #e8602c;
    46→  --ember-deep: #c2461a;
    47→  --amber:      #f5a623;
    48→  --amber-soft: #ffce7a;
    49→
    50→  /* River — the depth */
    51→  --river:      #1c4651;
    52→  --river-2:    #163840;
    53→  --night:      #0e1c20;
    54→  --night-2:    #132a30;
    55→
    56→  /* Category accents (refined, not crayon) */
    57→  --c-culture: #b8791a;
    58→  --c-health:  #3d7355;
    59→  --c-youth:   #2d6b7a;
    60→  --c-elders:  #7e3a5c;
    61→  --c-family:  #b0653f;
    62→  --c-special: #e8602c;
    63→
    64→  /* Surfaces */
    65→  --bg:        var(--paper);
    66→  --surface:   #ffffff;
    67→  --surface-2: var(--paper-2);
    68→  --text:      var(--ink);
    69→  --text-soft: var(--ink-2);
    70→  --text-faint:var(--ink-3);
    71→  --border:    var(--line);
    72→
    73→  /* Depth */
    74→  --sh-sm: 0 1px 2px rgba(28,23,20,.05);
    75→  --sh-md: 0 2px 4px rgba(28,23,20,.04), 0 10px 28px rgba(28,23,20,.07);
    76→  --sh-lg: 0 8px 24px rgba(28,23,20,.10), 0 24px 64px rgba(28,23,20,.16);
    77→  --glow:  0 0 40px rgba(245,166,35,.28);
    78→
    79→  /* Type */
    80→  --display: "Fraunces", Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif;
    81→  --body:    "Hanken Grotesk", system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
    82→
    83→  --r-sm: 10px;
    84→  --r-md: 16px;
    85→  --r-lg: 24px;
    86→  --r-xl: 32px;
    87→  --wrap: 880px;
    88→}
    89→
    90→[data-theme="dark"] {
    91→  --bg:        var(--night);
    92→  --surface:   #16282e;
    93→  --surface-2: #1b3138;
    94→  --text:      #f3ede2;
    95→  --text-soft: #c3b8a8;
    96→  --text-faint:#8f8576;
    97→  --border:    #244149;
    98→  --line:      #244149;
    99→  --line-2:    #2d4f58;
   100→  --paper-2:   #1b3138;
